data.title: Nvidia to license key AI chip tech from Groq, hires top execs, not a full takeover. Update on previous report.
data.description: Nvidia has announced a strategic move to license essential technology from Groq, an AI chip startup, and has also acquired key personnel from the company. Contrary to previous reports suggesting a full takeover, this development indicates a partnership rather than an acquisition. This decision signifies Nvidia's interest in Groq's AI chip technology and its desire to leverage the expertise of its top executives. This collaboration is anticipated to bolster Nvidia's position in the AI industry.

data.title: Investors urged to seek lead plaintiff role in Blue Owl Capital Inc. securities fraud case. Lawsuit covers OWL securities between Feb 6, 2025 and Nov 16, 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP disclosed the filing of a class action lawsuit for investors who bought or acquired Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) securities from February 6, 2025, to November 16, 2025. The lawsuit pertains to alleged discrepancies during the mentioned period regarding the company's actions.

data.title: Investors of DeFi Technologies Inc. encouraged to seek lead plaintiff role in securities fraud case with Johnson Fistel.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP revealed the initiation of a class action lawsuit for investors holding DeFi Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: DEFT) securities. This includes individuals who bought or acquired DEFT stocks between May 12, 2025, and November 14, 2025.

data.title: ExGen secures another LOI to purchase a second silver stream on a previous gold mine.
data.description: In a recent report, it was stated that 3,500 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. These numbers mark a significant increase from the previous day and have raised concerns about the ongoing spread of the virus. Additionally, the total number of active cases in the region has now reached 25,000, putting a strain on local healthcare facilities. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the rising number of infections.

data.title: Johnson Fistel is probing GM directors for breaches in safety and disclosures, with focus on fiduciary duty. $GM #GeneralMotors
data.description: In San Diego on December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, a shareholder rights law firm, announced an investigation into potential derivative claims involving General Motors Company (NYSE: GM). The investigation aims to determine if specific officers and directors may have violated their fiduciary responsibilities to the company and its shareholders.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) post-earnings disclosures after IPO stock plummet, Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego on December 24, 2025, legal firm Johnson Fistel, PLLP is examining potential violations of federal securities laws by Klarna Group plc (NYSE: KLAR) or specific individuals within the company. The investigation focuses on potential false or misleading statements made or undisclosed information by the company or its executives.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates potential claims for Five Below shareholders regarding breaches of fiduciary duty.
data.description: A legal firm in San Diego, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, is looking into potential derivative claims involving Five Below, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIVE) on Dec. 24, 2025. The investigation pertains to suspected breaches of fiduciary duty and violations of state and federal laws by specific officers and directors of Five Below.

data.title: VCs analyze crypto industry in 2025, highlighting regulatory changes and market winners/losers. Pantera, Hash3, and Variant share insights.
data.description: In 2025, venture partners like Pantera, Hash3, and Variant reflect on a year marked by regulatory changes and volatile markets. They analyze the cryptocurrency landscape, identifying the significant gainers and losers of the year.

data.description: The noteworthy LLMs in 2025 are making waves with impressive features, such as autonomous coding assistants and vision models that can analyze entire codebases. These advancements are capturing attention for their innovative capabilities.

data.title: Anfield Energy increases private placement to US$10 million for common shares and subscription receipts in Canada.
data.description: The following news release is only intended for distribution within Canada and should not be shared with United States newswire services or disseminated in the United States.

data.title: Nvidia to acquire AI chip startup Groq in $20 billion deal, marking their largest-ever acquisition.
data.description: In what is being hailed as the biggest acquisition in its history, the Dow tech giant is set to acquire the AI chip startup Groq in a monumental deal worth a staggering $20 billion. This purchase represents a significant move in the tech industry and underscores the growing importance of artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Tips for financial success in 2026: have a clear plan, boost emergency fund, start tax planning early. via Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Plan ahead for the new year by making smart financial decisions. Ensure a clear financial plan is in place to navigate the anticipated fluctuations of 2026. It is crucial to prioritize building an emergency fund to handle unforeseen expenses. Additionally, initiating tax planning early can lead to potential savings. These strategies can help individuals save more and invest wisely in the upcoming year.

data.title: 2026 retirement planning: strategies to lower taxes, increase income, and grow portfolio with new laws. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Looking ahead to the upcoming year, it is crucial to start considering retirement planning and tax strategies as regulations are anticipated to alter in 2026. To effectively decrease your income tax obligations and enhance your investment portfolio, there are several smart savings and investment approaches worth considering. By implementing these strategies, you can efficiently fuel your investments, increase your income, and reduce your overall tax burden, thereby setting yourself up for a financially secure retirement.
Nvidia: We're not acquiring Groq, We're just licensing tech. We will integrate Groq products into future offerings. $NVDA

data.title: Everybody Loves Languages Corp. is being acquired by ELL Ventures Ltd. in a business combination agreement signed on December 24, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto, Everybody Loves Languages Corp. (ELLC) disclosed a merger with ELL Ventures Ltd. (EV) through a Business Combination Agreement signed on December 24, 2025. ELLC, listed on TSX-V as ELL, OTC as LMDCF, and FSE as LIMA, operates in language education and entertainment content. The agreement outlines a deal where ELLC shareholders will join forces with EV. For more information, visit the company's website at everybodyloveslanguages.com.

data.title: Johnson Fistel is looking into potential derivative claims on behalf of Molina Healthcare, Inc. (MOH) shareholders over alleged fiduciary breaches tied to undisclosed medical cost trends. Class action covers claims from February 5, 2025.
data.description: In San Diego on December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP announced an investigation into potential derivative claims concerning Molina Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: MOH). The investigation relates to purported fiduciary breaches associated with undisclosed medical cost trends. The class action in question has a scope from February 5, 2025.

data.title: Xali Gold acquires Pico Machay Gold Project in Peru from Pan American Silver Corp on Dec 24, 2025.
data.description: Xali Gold Corp. (TSXV:XGC) based in Vancouver, British Columbia finalized the acquisition of the Pico Machay Gold Project in Peru on December 24, 2025. This advanced exploration stage project is targeted for near-term production. The acquisition involved Minera Calipuy S.A.C. (“Calipuy”), the owner of Pico Machay, being purchased from Pan American Silver Corp. (“Pan American”) and its subsidiary, Aquiline Resources Inc. The deal was first mentioned in a news release on October 24, 2025.

data.title: Johnson Fistel investigates possible fiduciary breaches in $210/share go-private deal of Electronic Arts (NASDAQ: EA) board members.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, a shareholder rights law firm based in San Diego, announced they are investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by the board members of Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA). The investigation is regarding the proposed sale of the gaming company to an investor. This news highlights a significant development in the financial sector, impacting shareholders of Electronic Arts Inc. The investigation signifies a substantial concern regarding the acquisition deal and the actions of the board members in relation to safeguarding shareholder interests. Stay tuned for further updates on this evolving situation.
